title: Android Split And Desktop Stability
notes: Desktop launcher behavior and update flow stay unchanged for existing PC users.
Lumorix now has a separate Android catalog lane and dedicated mobile package identifiers for future phone releases.
DropDash gained mobile-ready touch controls and a dedicated Android manifest alongside the existing desktop package.
The launcher and DropDash Tauri runtimes were split into reusable desktop-plus-mobile entry points so Android builds can be added without changing desktop startup behavior.
